acceptance_criteria: A Rust validator enforces stage presence, handoffs, profile evidence, parent/child links, and changed-path coverage.
CI runs the validator separately from the Rust workspace quality gate.

open_questions.question: Changed-path coverage ignores work-items/ because those artifacts are process metadata rather than target implementation paths.

objective: Review the existing CI and testing baseline.
findings: The repo has a Rust workspace gate but no process conformance check.
A shared Rust crate is the right place for reusable repository validation.
constraints: Validation must not mutate repo-tracked state.
The validator must operate on committed work-item artifacts.
